commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=15b48738f09a6e1480149eaf257d0d5a237cdac1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `diagnostics.memoryPressureThresholds` schema/type/help/label entries, threads them into diagnostic heartbeat memory sampling, treats the config as no-restart reload input, and adds focused config/reload/memory tests.

PR surface: Source +94, Tests +156. Total +250 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main lacks `diagnostics.memoryPressureThresholds` in the schema and the heartbeat does not pass thresholds into `emitDiagnosticMemorySample`. I did not run the runtime locally because this was a read-only review, but the source path is clear.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can add the missing public docs for the new config surface while preserving the contributor’s implementation and proof.
